Off Calendar Jul-16-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ROBERT SPRAGUE Motion for an Award of Attorney Fees Incurred In Collection of Judgment. Appearances: Curtis Kekeo, Jr. Defendant in Pro Per and opposing party. Defendant failed to give notice, pursuant to San Francisco Local Rule 8.3. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is granted. Plaintiff awarded a total of $11,367 as reasonable fees and costs. All future collection motions to be brought in the discovery department per San Francisco Local Rule 10(A)(3). (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

Petition To Determine Third Party Claim Of Fchristina Sagonowsky
Off Calendar Apr-09-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: 404/Commissioner Marjorie Slabach Clerk: Hortensia G. Ponce Reported by Maria Viscio CSR#12353

Petnr present in pro per. Resp not present. Christina Sagonowsky present in pro per. Petnr and Ms. Sagonowsky sworn and testified. Lee Ormasa, Interest party and holder of attorney fees award in the Judgment, present in pro per. After review of pleadings and testimony, the Court is allowing the sale to go through as scheduled by the Sheriff (firesale) on 4/28/09. Parties shall request, by way of exparte, that the Court retain jurisdiction over the property for the purpose of determining a fair market value of that property which should not be established by the sale price, but instead by an appraisal for the purpose of determining what Resp owes you as a result of the community property value loss.
